name: Keysight Technologies, Inc.
summary: Keysight Technologies, Inc. is a global provider of design and test solutions for the computing, communications, and electronics markets. The company offers hardware instruments (spectrum analyzers, oscilloscopes, network analyzers, signal generators, power supplies), software, and services that enable customers to design, validate, manufacture, deploy, and optimize electronic products. Revenue is primarily derived from R&D applications, serving over 40,000 end customers annually across communications, aerospace, defense, automotive, energy, semiconductor, and other industries in over 100 countries.

products.name: Spectrum and Signal Analyzers
products.description: Analysis of complex communications and radar signals across RF, microwave, and optical frequencies.

products.name: Network Analyzers
products.description: Characterization of electronic components and subsystems behavior under a range of input signals.

products.name: Power Analyzers
products.description: Measurement of voltage, current, and power characteristics of electronic devices or systems.

products.name: Protocol Analyzers
products.description: Debug, validation, and optimization of electronic systems using protocols such as PCIe and USB.

products.name: Oscilloscopes
products.description: Precise visualization, debug, and characterization of time domain signals across wide operating conditions.

products.name: Digital Multimeters
products.description: Accurate measurement of basic electrical parameters in a variety of form factors.

products.name: Signal Generators
products.description: Precise generation of a broad variety of signals used to stimulate electronic devices and systems under test.

products.name: Power Supplies
products.description: Precise control of power delivery to electrical and electronic systems under test.

products.name: Network Test Products
products.description: Debug, validation, and characterization of communication networks and components across operating conditions.

products.name: Network Visibility Products
products.description: Portfolio delivering data insight on network traffic, applications, and users to ensure connectivity and security.

products.name: Design Engineering Software
products.description: Software solutions for design and data management, including computer-aided engineering capabilities.

products.name: Enterprise Software Solutions
products.description: Software delivered via dedicated enterprise sales force to drive recurring revenue and cross-selling.

products.name: Keysight Services Portfolio
products.description: Broad services extending solution lifecycle value for customers worldwide.
